title: Sparkling-Fresh
overview: Mitsumi heads out for her entrance ceremony, confident that her day will be perfect, only to get lost. When she's panicking at the station, a boy wearing her school's uniform talks to her.

title: Fidgeting and Wandering
overview: Heading into self-intros, Mitsumi is a nervous wreck. Nao-chan tries to ease her fears, but she makes a choice that she will end up regretting.

title: Dreamy and Sparky
overview: Mitsumi heads to the student council office after school, where she finds Makoto standing frozen by the door.

title: Tingling and Scraping
overview: Kanechika enlists Mitsumi’s help in getting Shima to join the drama club. He shows her a recording of an old TV show…

title: Prickly and Giddy
overview: Mitsumi finds herself in the volleyball event for the class matches. Unathletic as she is, she asks Mika, who used to be on her school’s volleyball team, to help her practice.

title: Drizzling and Flickering
overview: Fumi’s in love, but Mitsumi doesn’t have time to internalize it as exams are right around the corner!

title: Hectic and Hot Stuff
overview: There's good news and bad news as Mitsumi and Narumi wonder how to cheer up a friend and Narumi's past is revealed.

title: Heat and Complications
overview: Mitsumi and Sousuke head to the zoo, where they are shadowed by a couple of worrywarts.

title: Drowsy and Peppy
overview: Summer break enters its latter half, and Mitsumi heads home to Ikajima. How does returning to her old stomping grounds affect her?

title: Scrambling and Dripping
overview: Class 1-3 is putting on a play for the upcoming school festival, but Mitsumi is torn between helping out and her student council duties.

title: Hype and Excitement
overview: The Tsubame West School Festival gets underway, and Mitsumi—surrounded by classmates being visited by friends and family—remembers that she’s a long way from home.

title: Shining
overview: It’s the second and final day of the school festival, and Mitsumi’s class gets some surprise visits from Sousuke’s family and friends.
